prompt: Run the Promptless edu campaign content pipeline. Pick a random keyword from the keyword list and generate a blog article. Save the final MDX file to the outputs directory. Do NOT create a git branch, PR, or Slack notification -- this is a test run.

assertions.name: has_complete_frontmatter
assertions.description: Article has all required frontmatter fields

assertions.name: imports_components
assertions.description: Article imports both required Astro components
